data.description: You can grant spell resistance to your allies.

As a conjurer, favor that objects you spells produce a billowing out thin Vou. Conjuring creatures of air, and clouds or fog can summon creatures from elsewhere to fight on your behalf. As mastery grows, learn to cast spells for transportation and teleportation across vast distances, including planes of existence.

Starting 6th level, you can use an action to teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space that you can see. Alternatively, you can range a space occupied by a Small or Medium creature and swap places with it if the creature is willing. You can't use this feature again until you finish a long rest or cast a conjuration spell of 1st level or higher.
